name: persona_template
description: Skeleton for defining a persona or role‑based overrides used in prompts.
---

# Persona Template

## Name
<!-- Unique identifier for the persona, e.g., `code-architect` -->

## Description
<!-- Brief overview of the persona's responsibilities, tone, and any special behavior. -->

## Overrides
- **Toolsets**: []  <!-- List toolsets that this persona enables or restricts. -->
- **Personality**: ""  <!-- Choose a personality preset, e.g., `concise`, `friendly`. -->
- **Additional Settings**: {}

## Example Usage
```yaml
persona: code-architect
```
